body:
## Problem
8 genre landing pages at `/genre/thrash`, `/genre/death`, `/genre/black`, `/genre/progressive`, `/genre/nu-metal`, `/genre/groove`, `/genre/metalcore`, `/genre/hardcore` are live routes in App.js with SSR meta handlers in `api/meta/index.js:221–232` BUT:
- **Zero sitemap entries** (confirmed: grep finds 0 URL entries for /genre in api/sitemap.js)
- **No JSON-LD schema** — SSR handler returns title/description only, no `articleSchema` → crawlers see no structured data
- `/genres` hub page has no SSR meta handler AND no sitemap entry

Google cannot discover these pages via sitemap. AI crawlers cannot classify the genre content.

## Target queries
- "thrash metal drummers gear" (Metallica, Slayer, Anthrax intent)
- "death metal drum kit" (George Kollias, Pete Sandoval intent)
- "black metal drummer setup" (Inferno, Hellhammer intent)
- "progressive metal drummer" (Brann Dailor, Tomas Haake intent)

## Genres in data (8 slugs)
Source: `packages/frontend/data/genres.js` `getAllGenreSlugs()`
`thrash, death, black, progressive, nu-metal, groove, metalcore, hardcore`

## Files to touch
1. `api/sitemap.js` — import `getAllGenreSlugs` from genres.js; add:
   - `{ loc: '/genres', priority: '0.9', changefreq: 'weekly' }`
   - `...getAllGenreSlugs().map(slug => ({ loc: `/genre/${slug}`, priority: '0.8', changefreq: 'monthly' }))`
2. `api/meta/index.js` — in the existing genre handler (line 221), add `articleSchema` with CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD
3. Add `/genres` hub handler to `api/meta/index.js` with CollectionPage schema

## Schema shape (per genre page)
```json
[
  { "@type": "CollectionPage", "name": "Thrash Metal Drummers — Gear & Setups", "url": "https://metalforge.io/genre/thrash" },
  { "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [
    { "@type": "Question", "name": "Who are the top thrash metal drummers?", "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": "Top thrash metal drummers include Lars Ulrich (Metallica), Dave Lombardo (Slayer), and Charlie Benante (Anthrax) — see their full gear setups on MetalForge." } },
    { "@type": "Question", "name": "What drum kits do thrash metal drummers use?", "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": "Thrash metal drummers commonly use Tama, Pearl, and Ludwig kits with 22–24\" bass drums for maximum power and projection." } },
    { "@type": "Question", "name": "What cymbals are standard in thrash metal?", "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": "Zildjian A Custom, Paiste RUDE, and Sabian HHX are the most popular cymbal lines in thrash metal for their bright, cutting attack." } }
  ]}
]
```

## Page count
9 pages: 1 hub (/genres) + 8 genre landing pages.

## Quality gate
- ✅ All 8 genre slugs from `getAllGenreSlugs()` in sitemap
- ✅ /genres hub at priority 0.9, /genre/<slug> at 0.8
- ✅ CollectionPage + FAQPage (≥3 Q&A) on each genre page
- ✅ /genres hub has CollectionPage schema

## Verify
1. `grep "genre" api/sitemap.js` — should return 9+ URL entries
2. `curl -s "https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/genre/thrash"` — JSON should include `articleSchema` with CollectionPage + FAQPage
3. Google Rich Results Test on `/genre/thrash` — FAQPage validates
4. All 8 genre slugs appear in sitemap XML output
5. `/genres` hub appears in sitemap at priority 0.9

## Done
All 8 `/genre/<slug>` pages + `/genres` hub in sitemap.js; each has CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD in SSR meta; /genres hub has SSR meta + CollectionPage schema.
title: SEO batch: /genre/<slug> pages + /genres hub — add to sitemap.js + CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD (~9 pages)
note: /genres hub + /genre/<slug> sitemap entries and CollectionPage/FAQPage JSON-LD already applied — verified 2026-06-20: all 8 genre slugs in sitemap.js (getAllGenreSlugs()), /genres at priority 0.9, each genre page returns CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD with 3 Q&A from genres.js faq array
